title: 12308+, MT-Haplogroup U or K
summary: 12308+, MT-Haplogroup U or K.
detail: One of the three SNPs required for Mitochondrial haplogroup U or K is present. This also indicates a mutation in the mitochondrial gene for building proteins containing the amino acid Leucine. It has been linked to a 1.5x increased risk of Age-related Macular Degeneration.
whyItMatters: SNPedia has a genotype-specific page for this result, which can add consumer-facing context alongside primary evidence sources.
